title: Draft agenda for the 66th Management Board (MB) meeting, Virtual, 12 March 2026
text:
MB (26) 14
Draft Agenda
for the 66th Management Board (MB) Virtual Meeting in 2026
12 March 2026 (Thursday)
1. Opening of the meeting and adoption of the agenda
Document(s) MB (26) 14 Draft MB Agenda
Introduction by MB Chairperson (AKOS)
Action requested To agree on the Agenda and identify any points to be raised under ‘Any
other business’ (AOB).
2. Recent activities of the BEREC Office Advisory Group (BAG)
Document(s) For information:
MB (26) 15 Conclusions of the 1st BAG meeting
MB (26) 16 Information on the transfers by the BEREC Office Director in
the BEREC Office Budget 2025
MB (26) 17 Draft BEREC Office Report on budgetary and financial
management 2025
For approval and publication:
MB (26) 18 Draft Decision of the BEREC Office Management Board on the
annual appraisal of the Accounting Officer
For approval for submission to the Commission:
MB (26) 19 Draft Decision of the BEREC Office Management Board
requesting the Commission Agreement on derogating from Commission
Decision C(2025)7357 of 6.11.2025 on the general provisions for
implementing Article 27 of the Staff Regulations of Officials of the
European Union and Article 12(1) of the Conditions of Employment of
Other Servants of the European Union.
Introduction by BAG Chair (BNetzA)
BEREC Office Director
Action requested To take note of the information and approve the documents as listed
above.
Agenda of the 66th Ordinary meeting of the Management Board, 12 March 2026

3. AOB
Information on the 67th MB plenary meeting (3 June 2026, Dublin, Ireland)
Document(s) No documents
Introduction by Representative of host NRA (ComReg)
Action requested To take note of the information.
Agenda of the 66th Ordinary meeting of the Management Board, 12 March 2026
author: BEREC Office
